label: Active baseline after stale-viewer fix
notes: This session is the retained comparison point for future tuning runs.
The stale viewer was rejected once, then rejoined with viewer build provenance populated.
The stream upgraded to FULL and held 1600x900 without any ABR degrade.
Native capture stayed healthy with zero queue drops.
The remaining quality gap is receiver-side buffering: the viewer jitter buffer climbed into the mid/high-70 ms range and did not drain.
